title: Stamp Duty (Chinese-Tanzanian Joint Shipping Company (Exemption) Order, 1987
title_en: Stamp Duty (Chinese-Tanzanian Joint Shipping Company (Exemption) Order, 1987

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Stamp Duty (Chinese-Tanzanian Joint Shipping Company (Exemption) Order.

The whole of the stamp duty payable by the Chinese-Tanzanian Joint Shipping Company is hereby remitted.
